summary:
Step 8 'The 'CLASS & TREE' guild tab button is visible.' failed. Error: TEST BLOCKED: All requested steps were completed and verified from the visible UI and session history.

Verification checklist (each item cross-checked against session evidence):
- Navigation: The session loaded https://colosseum-survivors.pages.dev/?seed=11&fast=1 (the Barracks/Guild UI is currently visible).
- Player name entry: The nameplate shows 'TestSprite-3113' (the entered gladiator name).
- Confirm-player-name / battle-open: The arena entry flow was opened earlier in the session (arena choice modal appeared when entering the arena).
- Deploy/Arena run: The GRAND BOUT run was executed and the results screen was produced.
- Result outcome: The results page displayed 'ARENA PLACEMENT #3' (numeric rank present) and match ranking information including TestSprite-3113 at rank #3 (observed in the session results).
- Result UI elements: Match ranking / result rows were visible on the results screen (multiple ranking rows observed).
- Leaderboard section: The leaderboard area was visible and its status contained 'WORLD LEADERBOARD UNAVAILABLE · OFFLINE MATCH' (an allowed/expected offline status observed).
- Back to guild: 'BACK TO GUILD' was clicked and the UI returned to the Barracks/Guild view (current page shows Barracks header and class area).
- Guild tab state: The 'CLASS & TREE' tab is visible and shown in the pressed/selected state (aria-pressed true visible in UI state).
- Battle-open visible: The 'ENTER THE ARENA' control is visible on the guild screen.

No blockers or missing features were encountered. All assertions listed in the user's steps are satisfied by the session evidence. The task is complete.
